---
title: ""
---

::: {.home-shell}
::: {.profile-sidebar}
<img
  class="profile-photo"
  src="images/profile/markuss-headshot-840.jpg"
  alt="Markuss Saule headshot"
  width="840"
  height="1176"
  fetchpriority="high"
>

### Markuss Saule

<div class="identity-line">Analytics Engineering and Applied Data Science</div>

<div class="profile-disciplines">
<div class="discipline-row"><span class="discipline-pill">Business Analytics</span><span class="discipline-pill">Statistics</span></div>
<div class="discipline-row"><span class="discipline-pill">Data Science</span></div>
</div>

I build measured, testable decision systems for enterprise operations, product analytics, healthcare, and financial research.

<div class="profile-links">
<a class="btn-primary" href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/markuss-saule/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="files/resume.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Resume PDF</a>
</div>

<div class="profile-meta">
<div><span>GPA</span><strong>4.0</strong></div>
<div><span>Degree</span><strong>BS Business Analytics</strong></div>
<div><span>Minors</span><strong>Statistics, Data Science</strong></div>
<div><span>Core Stack</span><strong>Python, SQL, R, Power BI</strong></div>
</div>
:::

::: {.home-main}
::: {.hero-panel .reveal}
<div class="kicker">// Enterprise Analytics, Statistical Systems, Applied AI</div>

<h1 class="hero-h1"><span class="gradient-text-animated">I build </span><span class="typed-text gradient-text-animated" data-phrases='["decision systems.","measurement engines.","research products.","analytics infrastructure."]'></span></h1>

<p class="hero-subtitle">I work from instrumentation and source quality through statistical validation, product delivery, and executive-ready decisions. At Volvo, that means measurement for digital journeys serving 3M+ monthly users, $50K in annual software savings, and monitoring that exposed a material high-intent funnel failure.</p>

<p class="hero-personal">Healthcare is personal to me. Family health challenges shaped how I define impact, and why I care about platform-level systems that improve outcomes at scale.</p>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="btn-primary" href="projects.html">View Projects</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="resume.html">Experience Timeline</a>
</div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">Current Flagship</span>

<div class="section-intro">Earnings Quality Autopsy is a full-stack SEC/XBRL research system that tests whether management narratives are supported by accounting evidence.</div>

::: {.flagship-panel .reveal-scale}
<img class="flagship-banner flagship-banner-contain" src="images/projects/earnings-quality-autopsy/cover.png" alt="Earnings Quality Autopsy claim-to-number evidence map">
<div class="flagship-copy">
<div class="eyebrow">// Flagship build</div>

### Earnings Quality Autopsy

The platform ingests official SEC companyfacts and XBRL data, normalizes quarterly statements, and connects management claims to cash conversion, working capital, margin, segment, disclosure, and non-GAAP evidence. It exports a source-backed dossier, research note, and analyst workpapers without issuing ratings, price targets, or unsupported allegations.

The central design choice is traceability. Every conclusion retains its source, required checks, supporting and tension evidence, confidence, limitations, and next question. Missing evidence stays visible instead of being converted into false certainty.

<div class="flagship-stats reveal-stagger">
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="187">0</strong><span>backend tests collected</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="14">0</strong><span>FastAPI routes across the research workflow</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="9">0</strong><span>forensic analysis modules</span></div>
<div class="flagship-stat"><strong data-count="5">0</strong><span>output formats for analyst handoff</span></div>
</div>

<div class="hero-actions">
<a class="btn-primary" href="projects/earnings-quality-autopsy.html">Explore the Project</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="files/earnings-quality-autopsy/aapl-earnings-quality-dossier.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open AAPL Dossier</a>
</div>
</div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">Operating Doctrine</span>

::: {.operating-grid .reveal-stagger}
<div class="op-card"><h4>Systems First</h4><p>I model the full system before choosing metrics. Local optimization without systems context is noise.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Risk Explicitly</h4><p>I surface thresholds, failure modes, and confidence bounds so leaders can act under uncertainty.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Bottlenecks Before Features</h4><p>I prioritize constraints that limit throughput, access, and quality before adding complexity.</p></div>
<div class="op-card"><h4>Tradeoffs Over Vanity KPIs</h4><p>I design analytics around decision consequences, not dashboard aesthetics.</p></div>
:::

## <span class="gradient-text">Selected Outcomes</span>

<div class="metric-strip reveal-stagger">
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="3" data-suffix="M+">0</strong><span>Monthly users covered by Volvo digital measurement work</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-prefix="$" data-count="50" data-suffix="K">0</strong><span>Annual software run-rate eliminated through martech rationalization</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="2250">0</strong><span>Qualified applicants generated through BYU-Idaho recruiting analytics</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-prefix="$" data-count="370" data-suffix="K">0</strong><span>Sponsorship value surfaced through Fresno State prospect scoring</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="175" data-suffix="K">0</strong><span>People reached by Latvia's national public-health campaign</span></div>
<div class="metric-pill"><strong data-count="6.5" data-suffix="B+">0</strong><span>Roblox place visits across shipped immersive brand and game experiences</span></div>
</div>

## <span class="gradient-text">Featured Projects</span>

::: {.project-grid .reveal-stagger}
<a class="project-card" href="projects/earnings-quality-autopsy.html"><img class="project-thumb project-thumb-contain" src="images/projects/earnings-quality-autopsy/cover.png" alt="Earnings Quality Autopsy evidence map"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-topline"><span class="project-badge">Flagship</span></div><div class="card-title">Earnings Quality Autopsy</div><p>SEC/XBRL forensic research system that maps management claims to accounting evidence and PM-ready workpapers.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Python</span><span class="chip">FastAPI</span><span class="chip">Next.js</span><span class="chip">SEC/XBRL</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/radiology-value-pipeline.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/radiology-value-pipeline/cover.png" alt="Radiology Value Pipeline review workspace"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-topline"><span class="project-badge">Flagship</span></div><div class="card-title">Radiology Value Pipeline</div><p>Clinical AI workflow platform for chest X-ray and brain MRI review, governed model runs, human feedback, audit trails, and Power BI reporting.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">FastAPI</span><span class="chip">PostgreSQL</span><span class="chip">Clinical AI</span><span class="chip">Power BI</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/owl.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/owl/cover.svg" alt="OWL knowledge graph"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-topline"><span class="project-badge">Open Source</span></div><div class="card-title">OWL: Autonomous AI Discovery Daemon</div><p>Local-first AI daemon with knowledge graph, discovery engine, Electron desktop app, MCP server, and 5 deployment modes.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Node.js</span><span class="chip">Electron</span><span class="chip">SQLite</span><span class="chip">LLM</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/falsifyr.html"><img class="project-thumb project-thumb-contain" src="images/projects/falsifyr/cover.png" alt="falsifyr attack report"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-topline"><span class="project-badge">CRAN-targeted</span></div><div class="card-title">falsifyr: Adversarial Statistical Testing</div><p>R package that searches for the smallest plausible perturbation capable of overturning a statistical claim.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">R</span><span class="chip">Robustness</span><span class="chip">65 Tests</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/wayline.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/wayline/cover.png" alt="Wayline road trip planner"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">Wayline: Analytics-Driven Road Trip Planner</div><p>Production-minded trip planner with route orchestration, stop scoring, predictive fit, analytics events, and exports.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">Node.js</span><span class="chip">Google Maps</span><span class="chip">Predictive Scoring</span></div></div></a>
<a class="project-card" href="projects/roblox-brand-worlds.html"><img class="project-thumb" src="images/projects/roblox-brand-worlds/cover.jpg" alt="Roblox Black Adam immersive world"><div class="project-body"><div class="card-title">Roblox Immersive Brand Worlds</div><p>10 years of Roblox worldbuilding across shipped games, early music events, and global brand activations reaching 6.5B+ place visits.</p><div class="chips"><span class="chip">6.5B+ Visits</span><span class="chip">3D Design</span><span class="chip">Brand Worlds</span></div></div></a>
:::

<div class="center-link"><a class="btn-ghost" href="projects.html">See full project archive</a></div>
:::
:::
